forbidden_hex_mentions.note: Forbidden hex values appear ONLY in anti-pattern/forbidden_colors declarations or 'NOT pure X' explanatory notes. They are NEVER applied as styling to any overlay.

wrong_red_violations.issue: Declared in palette as 'red_negative' but LOCOS brand red is #E30613 (locos-brand-color-language#locos-palette-gold-schwarz-rot). The #FF4444 value is coral/orange-red, not LOCOS brand red.
wrong_red_violations.impact: Documentation/palette declaration inconsistency only. Never used in any actual overlay — all 39 overlays use #E30613 for red accents and #D4A017 or #F5D37A for gold. Does NOT block render.
wrong_red_violations.recommendation: Remove or rename the 'red_negative' entry to avoid future agents picking it up. Keep #E30613 as the single red accent.

wrong_red_violations.location: mograph-overlay-specs.json line 26 — brand_constraints.palette.red_positive (sic, also OV032 accent_color)
wrong_red_violations.issue: Key 'red_positive' is a naming typo (should be 'green_positive'). Hex value itself (#00C62E) is the approved B3.4 semantic green for positive/trust elements and IS used in OV032 TrustCheckmarkStatCard for 'Altbestand Vertrauensschutz'.
wrong_red_violations.impact: Valid semantic use (B3.4 positive = green). Not a brand violation, just a key-name typo in the declaration object.
wrong_red_violations.recommendation: Rename key from 'red_positive' to 'green_positive' in mograph-overlay-specs.json for clarity.

fonts_used.Orbitron: 3 declarations (OV005 0-CENT hero, OV023 19%, OV024 hero numbers — appropriate for display/numeric hero)
fonts_used.Playfair Display: 3 declarations (OV021 quote, OV033 Nicht-Beanstandungsklausel, OV038 Danke Deutschland — appropriate accent font)

weight_400_violations.location: kinetic-moments.json — km-01 (OV003) words array — the '·' (bullet) separator character
weight_400_violations.impact: Bullet separator character. daniel-finance-3d-design#typography-weights says NIE weight 400. However this is a decorative middot, not headline text. Low visual impact but technically violates the rule.
weight_400_violations.recommendation: Raise to weight 700 or 800 for consistency, or render the separator as a styled div instead of text.

weight_500_violations.impact: Lower-third SUBTITLE line is weight 500. daniel-finance-3d-design#typography-weights demands 600-900 minimum. Subtitle readability is fine but will feel 'web-UI thin' vs broadcast bold. Three lower-thirds affected (lt-001 NACHTSCHICHT, lt-002 BMF LINK, lt-003 CTA).
weight_500_violations.recommendation: Raise subtitle font_weight to 600 (minimum) or 700 for broadcast feel. Title-cards.json already uses 600 — align them.

letter_spacing_audit.notes: Kinetic moments use -0.02 / -0.03 for numbers, 0.04 for headlines, 0.14-0.20 for uppercase labels. All compliant with daniel-finance-3d-design#typography-weights-letter-spacing.

gold_glow_missing_warning.issue: Gold-colored text moments (e.g. km-01 '22 JAHRE' in #f5d37a) do NOT have the recommended gold glow 'textShadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(255,180,30,0.5)'. Only the dark drop shadow is applied.
gold_glow_missing_warning.recommendation: Optional polish — add gold glow to hero gold numerals for 3D-material feel. Not a blocker.

emoji_audit.verdict: PASS — G10 remotion-gotcha respected, zero emojis in any text output (captions, kinetic, lower-thirds, title-cards, mograph specs)

typography_audit.forbidden_font_check: PASS — no Comic Sans, Calibri, Arial, Georgia, or system fonts found

du_violations.context: '...weil ich würde es wirklich gerne verstehen. Also wenn du einen Teil deiner Ersparnisse in krisenssichere Sachwerte i...'
du_violations.impact: Single 'du einen Teil deiner Ersparnisse' drift in Akt 6 (Schweiz-Lösung/CTA-area). Not catastrophic but breaks the 'ihr'-flow. Daniel may correct live, but spec should be consistent.
du_violations.recommendation: Replace with 'wenn ihr einen Teil eurer Ersparnisse in krisensichere Sachwerte investieren wollt'

du_violations.context: '...in China unter schweren Exportkontrollen stehen, dann hast du, wie gesagt, die Möglichkeit, hier mit meinem Team...'
du_violations.impact: Second drift in CTA area ('hast du, wie gesagt'). Same Akt as the first — voice drift concentrated in Schweiz-CTA section.
du_violations.recommendation: Replace with 'dann habt ihr, wie gesagt, die Möglichkeit' — keeps parasoziale Nähe konsistent bis zum Ende.

0 Cent / keinen Cent (OV005 FullscreenTakeover + km-08 + OV022 kinetic + captions)

hero_numbers_missing_or_unclear.note: Not part of BMF-Skript scope — 850 Tonnen is a Bundesbank-Gold reference typically used in other videos. Absence is correct for BMF-Industriemetalle topic.

hero_numbers_missing_or_unclear.status: rendered as 'keinen Cent' in captions but '0 CENT' as kinetic/fullscreen hero
hero_numbers_missing_or_unclear.note: OV005 FullscreenTakeover (0 CENT hero) + OV022 kinetic (0 CENT NEUE STEUERN) cover it visually. Captions use paraphrase 'keinen Cent'. OK.

sales_pitch_audit.lower_thirds_cta_tone: Viewer-benefit framing. lt-003 'LINK BMF-PDF · BESCHREIBUNG' + 'KOSTENFREIES ERSTGESPRÄCH · LOCOS.DE' — informational, not 'kauf jetzt'.

summary: PASS_WITH_WARNINGS. Zero Teal-Orange / zero Cyan / zero Magenta / zero Violet / zero Neon violations applied as style. All forbidden hex values (#06e0ff, #00ffff, #ff4aa0, #6a4aff) appear ONLY in forbidden_colors[] anti-pattern declarations, never rendered. Color-Segments uses LOCOS Premium Grade + shock-red-accent for the 2 PEAKs (col_004 Kobalt, col_006 Null-Cent) per user override. Fonts restricted to Inter/Montserrat/Playfair/Orbitron/DM Sans. Face-safe zone 0 violations. No emojis. Daniel voice: 33x ihr/euch (strong), 0x Sie, 0x mandanten-story-opener, klare Position in title-cards. 4 non-blocking warnings: (W1) 2x 'du'-drift in Schweiz-CTA captions — signature voice violation needs 1-minute fix; (W2) lower-third subtitle weight 500 — raise to 600; (W3) km-01 bullet separator weight 400; (W4) stale palette key naming typo with orphan '#FF4444' declaration (never applied). NONE of these block Phase-6 render. Phase-6 can proceed after optional fixes.
